title: error: Please use a fully qualified repository name
body:
skopeo-0.1.11-1.fc23.x86_64

No matter what I do I can only get an error to be output:

```
# skopeo --debug inspect https://docker.io/fedora 
FATA[0000] Please use a fully qualified repository name
```

comments.body: `https://` isn't part of an image reference - drop it off and just use `docker.io/fedora` - fully qualified here means adding the registry host before the image reference name

@runcom nothing worked for me. I tried that too:

```
# skopeo --debug inspect docker://docker.io/fedora                                                                                                                                                                        
FATA[0000] Please use a fully qualified repository name
```

```
# skopeo inspect docker.io/fedora
FATA[0000] Please use a fully qualified repository name
```
I see, the README.md you're reading is pretty new - refer to https://github.com/projectatomic/skopeo/tree/v0.1.11
For the record I did `man skopeo` on my system, which would have given me the correct documentation, but the man page was a template with no contents.
@dustymabe right, we added contents to the man page only in master :(
